description: A container for serial processing of nodes

parameterGroups.label: Switch Control
parameterGroups.rationale: Single parameter selecting which of 4 soft-bypassed signal paths is active. Routes to control.xfader Value parameter.

properties.note: Controls the UI layout orientation of the container.

gaps.question: softbypass_switch4 has 4 soft_bypass children and Switch max=3 vs softbypass_switch2's 2 children and max=1. Is the internal logic identical except for the additional switch targets?
gaps.context: If identical in structure, the doc can reference the base variant and note only the switch target count difference.

notes: Variant of softbypass_switchN with N=4. Switch parameter max=3 (values 0-3). Four container.soft_bypass children. Structure otherwise identical to base variant.
